query: We're locked into OpenAI for everything — no other providers are allowed. Should we switch our embedding model?
expected_behavior: Recognizes that meaningful embedding-model selection requires comparing candidates and that a single-provider lock-in eliminates most candidate options
Does NOT recommend a cross-provider model (e.g., Voyage, Cohere, BGE) given the stated lock-in constraint

Offers a constrained path that fits the lock-in: either compare OpenAI's own embedding tiers against one another (e.g., text-embedding-3-small vs text-embedding-3-large) OR pivot to non-embedding fixes (chunking, reranker, hybrid retrieval) that lift retrieval quality without changing the embedding provider
